responsibilities: Select the active link body and describe peer-level division of labor when needed.
Aggregate multi-agent outputs into the final structured delivery.
Resolve cross-agent conflicts and handle risk escalation.
coordination_rules: Multi-agent reporting must use the [xx-body]:xxx format.
Link body outputs must flow back to the controller.
operating_playbook: Read mission-context and task-board, then select the active link body and assign delivery goals.
When parallel link bodies are enabled, sync outputs and consolidate the final delivery.
escalation_triggers: Stop import if the host does not support subagents (sessions_spawn).
Trigger arbitration when link body outputs conflict.

recommended_skill.purpose: When the task primarily hits the Knowledge Link Body scope, provide the matching process, boundaries, and handoff templates.
